# Bike Builders
> Muzaffarpur's most trusted second-hand motorcycle dealer — buy, sell, and finance certified pre-owned bikes in Bihar.

## About
Bike Builders is a used motorcycle showroom located at Rambag Chowk, Rambag Road, Gaushala Chowk Mandir, Muzaffarpur, Bihar 842002, India.
- Phone: +91-8210283582 / +91-9835844897
- Email: support@bikebuilders.in
- Founded: 2018
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM

## What We Do
- Buy certified pre-owned motorcycles with 150-point inspection report and warranty
- Sell your used bike — instant valuation, free inspection, fast payment, RC transfer support
- Bike financing — low EMI plans, quick loan approvals, partner NBFCs and banks
- Brands: Royal Enfield, KTM, Bajaj, Honda, Yamaha, TVS, Hero, Suzuki
- Price range: ₹50,000 – ₹25,00,000
- Service area: Muzaffarpur, Patna, Darbhanga, Samastipur, Vaishali, Sitamarhi, Motihari, Bihar

## Trust Signals
- 150-point quality inspection on every bike
- RTO ownership transfer support included
- Warranty options available on select motorcycles
- Transparent pricing — no hidden charges
- 4.8★ average rating from 150+ customers
- Social: instagram.com/bikebuilders41 | youtube.com/@bikebuilders | facebook.com/bikebuilders.in
